summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Makia Capital website. All backend APIs (32 tests) and frontend UI flows pass. Auth, leads CRUD, admin dashboard, and all public pages working correctly.

issues: Uses text 'Makia Capital' instead of logo image in header - inconsistent with other pages that use logo image

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: HomePage.jsx line 17 has ESLint warning about missing 'opt' dependency in useEffect - should add eslint-disable comment or fix dependency array
seed_data_creation: Admin account auto-seeded on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend uses JWT auth with httpOnly cookies. Protected endpoints: GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/leads, GET /api/leads/stats/summary. Public endpoint: POST /api/leads. Admin seeded automatically on startup.

homepage.details: Nav links including Insights, Knowledge Hub shows 3 articles from insightsData.js, View All Insights button links to /insights, Logo has transparent background

insights_page.details: Article list with 3 articles, tabs (All/Newsletter/Research/Blog) working, article detail view working, back navigation working

pitch_form.details: 4-step form submission creates lead via POST /api/leads, success message displayed

admin_login.details: Login page loads, invalid credentials show error, valid credentials redirect to dashboard

admin_dashboard.details: Stats cards showing, leads table with data, status dropdown changes work, filter buttons work, logout redirects to login

about_page.details: Page loads with all sections (Our Perspective, Investment Thesis, Founders, Leadership)

auth_protection.details: Unauthenticated access to /admin redirects to /admin/login, GET /api/leads returns 401 without token
